component.name: Fresh!
component.summary: A Friday Night Funkin' mod launcher and manager.

description.p: Fresh! is a simple desktop application for discovering, installing, and launching Friday Night Funkin' mods.
It provides an easy way to browse mods from GameBanana, install them into supported engines, and manage different engine instances from one place.
Fresh! focuses on being fast, simple to use, and fun to experiment with while managing FNF mods.

ul.li: Discover mods and browse categories from GameBanana
Install mods directly into engine mod folders
Launch engines directly from the launcher

description.p: Supported engines include Psych Engine, Base Game / V-Slice, Codename Engine, FPS Plus, JS Engine, ALE Psych, and P-Slice.
Fresh! uses the GameBanana API to retrieve mod metadata and provide a streamlined mod installation experience.

screenshot.caption: Browse and discover mods by category
Manage installed mods and launch settings
